content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Pointman
description: Legendary Pangolin class mod for Axton the Commando, part of the Digistruct Peak content. Built around Pressure, Grit, Last Ditch Effort, Able, Healthy. Focused on turret durability and reload speed.
notes: Below level 50, versions with less than +5 skill bonuses cannot be obtained legitimately. Requires Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge to appear in-game.

special.description: At max level: +50.6% turret reload speed, +51% turret shield capacity. While the turret is active, grants +51% reload speed.
special.title: Point taken.
